info.name: OGM HRMS API
info.description:
Postman collection for the OGM HRMS API, generated from the live OpenAPI document.

USAGE:
1. Select the 'HRMS - Local (dev)' environment (sets baseUrl + admin credentials).
2. Run 'Authentication > Login' once. Its test script saves the JWT into the {{token}} variable in the active scope.
3. Every other request inherits Bearer {{token}} automatically.

Do NOT manually define a 'token'/'accessToken' variable — Login populates {{token}} for you. Access tokens expire after 15 minutes; re-run Login if requests start returning 401.

item.name: AI Assistant
item.description: Natural-language HR assistant that executes permission-checked tool calls.

request.description:
Submits a natural-language query; the assistant answers using tools bounded by the caller's permissions. Requires AI:VIEW.

`POST /api/v1/ai/assistant`

Returns the descriptors of tools the assistant can invoke. Requires AI:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/ai/tools`

item.name: Account Self-Service
item.description: Public password-reset and email-verification workflows.

request.description:
Sends a password-reset email if the address matches an account. Always responds success to avoid user enumeration. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/password-reset/request`

Validates and consumes the reset token, then sets the new password. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/password-reset/confirm`

Sends a verification email if the account exists and is unverified. Always responds success to avoid user enumeration. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/email/verify/request`

Validates and consumes the verification token, marking the account's email as verified. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/email/verify/confirm`

item.name: Announcements
item.description: Create, publish, and browse company-wide announcements.

request.description:
Returns a single announcement by its identifier. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/announcements/{id}`

Updates an existing announcement's content. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/announcements/{id}`

Soft-deletes an announcement. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/announcements/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of all announcements. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/announcements`

Creates a draft announcement. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/announcements`

Publishes an announcement so it becomes visible in the feed. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/announcements/{id}/publish`

Returns the current published announcement feed for the caller. Requires ANNOUNCEMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/announcements/feed`

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Wi-Fi/IP-based attendance: self-service check-in/out, history, corrections, approvals, and monthly summaries.

request.description:
Rejects a pending attendance record or correction. Requires ATTENDANCE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/attendance/{id}/reject`

Approves a pending attendance record or correction. Requires ATTENDANCE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/attendance/{id}/approve`

Applies a manual correction to an attendance record. Requires ATTENDANCE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/attendance/corrections`

Records the authenticated employee's check-out for the current attendance record. Requires ATTENDANCE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/attendance/check-out`

Records the authenticated employee's check-in, capturing client IP and User-Agent. Requires ATTENDANCE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/attendance/check-in`

Returns paginated attendance records filtered by employee, a single date, or a date range. Requires ATTENDANCE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/attendance`

Returns an attendance summary for an employee for the given year and month. Requires ATTENDANCE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/attendance/summary`

Returns a paginated attendance history for the authenticated employee, optionally filtered by a date range. Requires ATTENDANCE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/attendance/me`

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description: Read-only, append-only audit trail of system and user actions.

request.description:
Returns a paginated audit trail filterable by action, outcome, module, actor email, and time range. Requires the AUDIT:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/audit-logs`

Returns a single audit log entry by its identifier. Requires the AUDIT:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/audit-logs/{id}`

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Login, token refresh, logout, and current-user identity endpoints.

request.description:
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`

Revokes the supplied refresh token so it can no longer be used. Public endpoint.

`POST /api/v1/auth/logout`

Validates credentials and returns access and refresh tokens. Public endpoint; records client IP and user agent.

`POST /api/v1/auth/login`

Returns the profile, roles, and permissions of the authenticated caller. Requires a valid access token.

`GET /api/v1/auth/me`

item.name: Automation Engine
item.description: Configure scheduled automation rules and inspect or trigger their runs.

request.description:
Manually triggers an immediate run of the given automation type. Requires NOTIFICATION:ADMIN.

`POST /api/v1/automations/{type}/run`

Returns the automation rule for the given automation type. Requires NOTIFICATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/automations/{type}`

Updates configuration (schedule, enablement) for an automation rule. Requires NOTIFICATION:ADMIN.

`PATCH /api/v1/automations/{type}`

Returns all configured automation rules. Requires NOTIFICATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/automations`

Returns a paginated history of automation rule executions. Requires NOTIFICATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/automations/runs`

item.name: Company
item.description: Single-company profile: retrieve and update the company profile.

request.description:
Retrieves the single company profile. Requires COMPANY:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/company`

Updates the single company profile. Requires COMPANY:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/company`

item.name: Confirmation & Probation
item.description: Employee probation tracking and confirmation, extension, or termination, authorized under EMPLOYEE permissions.

request.description:
Returns paginated probation records filtered by employee and status. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/probation`

Starts a probation period for an employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/probation`

Terminates an employee during probation with optional remarks. Requires EMPLOYEE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/probation/{id}/terminate`

Extends an employee's probation period. Requires EMPLOYEE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/probation/{id}/extend`

Confirms an employee at the end of probation with optional details. Requires EMPLOYEE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/probation/{id}/confirm`

Returns a single probation record by its identifier. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/probation/{id}`

Returns probations ending within the given number of days (default 30). Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/probation/upcoming`

item.name: Dashboards
item.description: Aggregated HR analytics and per-employee self-service dashboard summaries.

request.description:
Returns the authenticated user's own self-service dashboard summary. Requires DASHBOARD:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/dashboard/me`

Returns company-wide aggregated HR dashboard widgets. Requires DASHBOARD:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/dashboard/hr`

item.name: Departments
item.description: Department master records: create, list, retrieve, update, and delete departments.

request.description:
Retrieves a single department by its identifier. Requires DEPARTMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/departments/{id}`

Updates an existing department master record. Requires DEPARTMENT:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/departments/{id}`

Deletes a department master record. Requires DEPARTMENT:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/departments/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of departments. Requires DEPARTMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/departments`

Creates a new department master record. Requires DEPARTMENT:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/departments`

item.name: Designations
item.description: Designation master records: create, list, retrieve, update, and delete designations.

request.description:
Retrieves a single designation by its identifier. Requires DESIGNATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/designations/{id}`

Updates an existing designation master record. Requires DESIGNATION:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/designations/{id}`

Deletes a designation master record. Requires DESIGNATION:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/designations/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of designations. Requires DESIGNATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/designations`

Creates a new designation master record. Requires DESIGNATION:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/designations`

item.name: Documents
item.description: Upload, list, preview, download, and delete employee and company documents.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of documents, optionally filtered by employee. Requires DOCUMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/documents`

Uploads a document file via multipart form data along with its metadata. Requires DOCUMENT:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/documents`

Returns the metadata for a single document by its identifier. Requires DOCUMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/documents/{id}`

Deletes a document by its identifier. Requires DOCUMENT:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/documents/{id}`

Streams the document binary content inline for in-browser preview. Requires DOCUMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/documents/{id}/preview`

Streams the document binary content as an attachment for download. Requires DOCUMENT:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/documents/{id}/download`

item.name: Email Templates
item.description: Manage reusable email templates and render or send them.

request.description:
Returns a single email template by its identifier. Requires EMAIL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/email-templates/{id}`

Updates an existing email template. Requires EMAIL:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/email-templates/{id}`

Deletes an email template. Requires EMAIL:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/email-templates/{id}`

Returns all email templates, optionally filtered by category. Requires EMAIL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/email-templates`

Creates a new email template. Requires EMAIL:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/email-templates`

Renders the template and sends it to the given recipient. Requires EMAIL:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/email-templates/{id}/send`

Renders the template with the supplied variables without sending. Requires EMAIL:VIEW.

`POST /api/v1/email-templates/{id}/preview`

item.name: Employee Lifecycle
item.description: Onboarding and offboarding lifecycle cases and their task checklists, authorized under EMPLOYEE permissions.

request.description:
Returns paginated lifecycle cases filtered by employee, type, and status. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/lifecycle`

Starts a new onboarding or offboarding lifecycle case for an employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/lifecycle`

Adds a task to an existing lifecycle case. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/lifecycle/{id}/tasks`

Marks a lifecycle case task as completed with optional notes. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/lifecycle/{id}/tasks/{taskId}/complete`

Cancels an in-progress lifecycle case. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/lifecycle/{id}/cancel`

Returns a single lifecycle case with its tasks by identifier. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/lifecycle/{id}`

item.name: Employee Profile
item.description: Employee profile sub-resources: emergency contacts, family, education, experience, and timeline.

request.description:
Updates an existing family member of the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/family/{id}`

Removes a family member from the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/family/{id}`

Updates an existing work experience record of the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/experience/{id}`

Removes a work experience record from the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/experience/{id}`

Updates an existing emergency contact of the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/emergency-contacts/{id}`

Removes an emergency contact from the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/emergency-contacts/{id}`

Updates an existing education record of the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/education/{id}`

Removes an education record from the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/education/{id}`

Lists all events in the employee's append-only timeline. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/timeline`

Appends an event to the employee's append-only timeline. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/timeline`

Lists all family members for the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/family`

Adds a family member to the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/family`

Lists all prior work experience records for the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/experience`

Adds a prior work experience record to the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/experience`

Lists all emergency contacts for the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/emergency-contacts`

Adds an emergency contact to the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/emergency-contacts`

Lists all education records for the employee. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/education`

Adds an education record to the employee profile. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/education`

Removes an event from the employee's timeline. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{employeeId}/timeline/{id}`

item.name: Employees
item.description: Employee master records: create, list, retrieve, update, and delete employees.

request.description:
Retrieves a single employee by its identifier. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees/{id}`

Updates an existing employee master record. Requires EMPLOYEE:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/employees/{id}`

Deletes an employee master record. Requires EMPLOYEE:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/employees/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of employees. Requires EMPLOYEE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employees`

Creates a new employee master record. Requires EMPLOYEE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/employees`

item.name: Employment Types
item.description: Employment type configuration: create, list, retrieve, update, and delete employment types.

request.description:
Retrieves a single employment type by its identifier. Requires SETTINGS:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employment-types/{id}`

Updates an existing employment type configuration. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`PUT /api/v1/employment-types/{id}`

Deletes an employment type configuration. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`DELETE /api/v1/employment-types/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of employment types. Requires SETTINGS:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/employment-types`

Creates a new employment type configuration. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`POST /api/v1/employment-types`

item.name: Global Search
item.description: Unified, permission-filtered search across HRMS entity types.

request.description:
Runs a single query across entity types the caller can view and returns typed results. Requires an authenticated user.

`GET /api/v1/search`

item.name: Holidays
item.description: Holiday calendar management, authorized by the HOLIDAY RBAC permissions.

request.description:
Returns a single holiday by its identifier. Requires HOLIDAY:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/holidays/{id}`

Updates an existing holiday by id. Requires HOLIDAY:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/holidays/{id}`

Removes a holiday from the calendar by id. Requires HOLIDAY:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/holidays/{id}`

Returns holidays filtered by year, date range, and/or holiday type. Requires HOLIDAY:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/holidays`

Adds a new holiday to the calendar. Requires HOLIDAY:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/holidays`

item.name: Leave
item.description: Leave balances and the apply/approve/reject/cancel request workflow, plus allocation and calendar views.

request.description:
Returns paginated leave requests filtered by employee and status. Requires LEAVE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/leave/requests`

Submits a new leave request for the authenticated employee, starting the approval workflow. Requires LEAVE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/leave/requests`

Rejects a leave request with optional remarks. Requires LEAVE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/leave/requests/{id}/reject`

Cancels the authenticated employee's own leave request. Requires LEAVE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/leave/requests/{id}/cancel`

Approves a leave request with optional remarks, advancing the approval workflow. Requires LEAVE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/leave/requests/{id}/approve`

Allocates or adjusts a leave balance for an employee. Requires LEAVE:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/leave/allocate`

Returns a paginated list of the authenticated employee's leave requests. Requires LEAVE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/leave/requests/me`

Returns leave requests overlapping the given date range for a calendar view. Requires LEAVE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/leave/calendar`

Returns all leave-type balances for an employee for the given year. Requires LEAVE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/leave/balances`

item.name: Leave Types
item.description: Configuration of leave types; reads require LEAVE:VIEW and changes require LEAVE:ADMIN.

request.description:
Updates an existing leave type configuration by id. Requires LEAVE:ADMIN.

`PUT /api/v1/leave-types/{id}`

Deletes a leave type configuration by id. Requires LEAVE:ADMIN.

`DELETE /api/v1/leave-types/{id}`

Returns all configured leave types. Requires LEAVE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/leave-types`

Creates a new leave type configuration. Requires LEAVE:ADMIN.

`POST /api/v1/leave-types`

item.name: Locations
item.description: Office location configuration: create, list, retrieve, update, and delete locations.

request.description:
Retrieves a single office location by its identifier. Requires SETTINGS:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/locations/{id}`

Updates an existing office location. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`PUT /api/v1/locations/{id}`

Deletes an office location. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`DELETE /api/v1/locations/{id}`

Returns a paginated list of office locations. Requires SETTINGS:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/locations`

Creates a new office location. Requires SETTINGS:ADMIN.

`POST /api/v1/locations`

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app notification center: read, dismiss, send, and retry notifications.

request.description:
Re-attempts delivery of a previously failed notification. Requires NOTIFICATION:ADMIN.

`POST /api/v1/notifications/{id}/retry`

Marks one of the caller's notifications as read. Requires NOTIFICATION:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/notifications/{id}/read`

Sends a notification to a target recipient (system/admin use). Requires NOTIFICATION:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/notifications/send`

Marks all of the caller's unread notifications as read. Requires NOTIFICATION:EDIT.

`POST /api/v1/notifications/read-all`

Returns the caller's own notifications, optionally filtered to unread only. Requires NOTIFICATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/notifications`

Returns the number of unread notifications for the caller. Requires NOTIFICATION:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count`

Deletes one of the caller's own notifications. Requires NOTIFICATION:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/notifications/{id}`

item.name: Reimbursements
item.description: Submit, review, approve, reject, pay, and cancel employee expense reimbursement claims.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of claims, optionally filtered by employee and status. Requires EXPENSE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/reimbursements`

Submits a new expense reimbursement claim for the authenticated user. Requires EXPENSE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/reimbursements`

Rejects a reimbursement claim with optional remarks. Requires EXPENSE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/reimbursements/{id}/reject`

Marks an approved reimbursement claim as paid. Requires EXPENSE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/reimbursements/{id}/pay`

Cancels the authenticated user's own pending reimbursement claim. Requires EXPENSE:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/reimbursements/{id}/cancel`

Approves a reimbursement claim with optional remarks. Requires EXPENSE:APPROVE.

`POST /api/v1/reimbursements/{id}/approve`

Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's own reimbursement claims. Requires EXPENSE:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/reimbursements/me`

item.name: Reports
item.description: Generate and export operational reports in CSV, Excel, or PDF format.

request.description:
Generates the requested report type over an optional date range and streams it in the chosen format (CSV, Excel, or PDF). Requires REPORT:EXPORT.

`GET /api/v1/reports/{type}`

item.name: Salary & Compensation
item.description: Manage employee salary structure revisions and generate, list, and download payslips.

request.description:
Returns the full salary structure revision history for an employee. Requires PAYROLL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/salary/structures`

Creates a new salary structure revision for an employee. Requires PAYROLL:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/salary/structures`

Returns a paginated list of payslips for an employee. Requires PAYROLL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/salary/payslips`

Generates a payslip for an employee for the requested pay period. Requires PAYROLL:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/salary/payslips`

Returns the currently effective salary structure for an employee. Requires PAYROLL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/salary/structures/current`

Returns a single payslip by its identifier. Requires PAYROLL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/salary/payslips/{id}`

Streams the payslip as a downloadable PDF attachment. Requires PAYROLL:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/salary/payslips/{id}/download`

item.name: System Administration
item.description: Read-only administrative console: system info, role catalogue, and login history.

request.description:
Returns runtime and deployment system information for the platform. Requires the SETTINGS:ADMIN permission.

`GET /api/v1/admin/system-info`

Returns the catalogue of roles with their associated permissions. Requires the AUTHZ:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/admin/roles`

Returns a paginated login-history log, optionally filtered by email. Requires the AUDIT:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/admin/login-history`

item.name: System Settings
item.description: Key/value configuration store for platform-wide settings.

request.description:
Returns a single system setting by its key. Requires the SETTINGS:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/settings/{key}`

Updates the value of an existing setting; non-editable settings are rejected. Requires the SETTINGS:ADMIN permission.

`PUT /api/v1/settings/{key}`

Removes a system setting by its key; non-editable settings cannot be removed. Requires the SETTINGS:ADMIN permission.

`DELETE /api/v1/settings/{key}`

Returns all system settings, optionally filtered by category. Requires the SETTINGS:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/settings`

Creates a new system setting entry. Requires the SETTINGS:ADMIN permission.

`POST /api/v1/settings`

item.name: User Management
item.description: Administrative management of user accounts, roles, and status.

request.description:
Toggles a user account's enabled status via the 'enabled' query parameter. Requires the AUTH:EDIT permission.

`PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/status`

Replaces the set of roles assigned to a user; assignment rules are enforced in the service. Requires the AUTHZ:EDIT permission.

`PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/roles`

Returns a paginated list of user accounts. Requires the AUTH:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/users`

Creates a new user account. Requires the AUTH:CREATE permission.

`POST /api/v1/users`

Returns a single user account by its identifier. Requires the AUTH:VIEW permission.

`GET /api/v1/users/{id}`

Deletes a user account by its identifier. Requires the AUTH:DELETE permission.

`DELETE /api/v1/users/{id}`

item.name: WhatsApp Messages
item.description: Browse the WhatsApp message ledger and update delivery/read status.

request.description:
Records a provider delivery/read status callback for a message. Requires WHATSAPP:EDIT.

`PATCH /api/v1/whatsapp/messages/{id}/status`

Returns a paginated ledger of sent WhatsApp messages. Requires WHATSAPP:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/whatsapp/messages`

Returns a single WhatsApp message by its identifier. Requires WHATSAPP:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/whatsapp/messages/{id}`

item.name: WhatsApp Templates
item.description: Manage WhatsApp message templates and render or send them.

request.description:
Returns a single WhatsApp template by its identifier. Requires WHATSAPP:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/whatsapp/templates/{id}`

Updates an existing WhatsApp template. Requires WHATSAPP:EDIT.

`PUT /api/v1/whatsapp/templates/{id}`

Deletes a WhatsApp template. Requires WHATSAPP:DELETE.

`DELETE /api/v1/whatsapp/templates/{id}`

Returns all WhatsApp templates, optionally filtered by category. Requires WHATSAPP:VIEW.

`GET /api/v1/whatsapp/templates`

Creates a new WhatsApp message template. Requires WHATSAPP:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/whatsapp/templates`

Renders the template and sends it as a WhatsApp message to the recipient. Requires WHATSAPP:CREATE.

`POST /api/v1/whatsapp/templates/{id}/send`

Renders the template with the supplied variables without sending. Requires WHATSAPP:VIEW.

`POST /api/v1/whatsapp/templates/{id}/preview`
